title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
